feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Service Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Service Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Additional fee for multiple users?
entry.content:
I am using AWS Cloud Service for using an appliance "SAP S/4HANA 2022 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance".

In the account using this cloud service, I have 3 users.

And 3 users need to use cloud simultaneously.

What I wonder is, does the number of users affect the cloud hosting fee?

entry.title: Service Cloud: Save Query as Default for Page Layout / Business Role
entry.content:
Hello all, 

is it possible as administrator to save a query, e.g. query XX for the ticket list, and use it as default query for a certain page layout or business role? 

I want to assure that the certain ticket list filter is used by the whole team. But, if I adapt the master layout and change the standard query for showing the ticket list (Service - Tickets - Advanced Search- Organize Queries), the other users dont have the same default query. Only my admin user itself sees the default query. Other users can see the query XX, but dont have the same default setting... 

Is this an issue due to personalization? Is it possible to overwrite the personalization?


Thanks for help!

Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: Support Portal for C4C Integration
entry.content:
Hi,

I found this old blog (Support site – easy to create, easy to consume, fu... - SAP Community) about the Support Portal of C4C. I just want to ask if this is still applicable or a valid blog. If yes, is there any updated documentation regarding the support portal functionality?

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Case Creation in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Use case : To demo an end to end flow of Customer experience for a B2C website using the following systems S/4HANA, SAP Commerce Cloud, Field Service Management (FSM), Service Cloud V2

Below are the queries for SAP Service Cloud V2:

1. How  can I  create tickets once the sales order is delivered  instead of creating manually?
2. Is there a way where I can add products/serviceable products to a case(service tickets) as I can see we are able to add only registered products now into an case.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have implemented Azure AD with SAP IAS. Users are provisioned from Azure AD to SAP IAS using IPS.

Now, I want to provision these users/groups from SAP IAS to the BTP using IPS and then assign BTP roles to them.

I want to disable the 'Shadow user' option in the trust configuration.

How can I automatically create users in SAP BTP who (for example) are members of a group in SAP IAS ?

 

Many Thanks 

Best regards

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud v2: How to create an event for the custom button created
entry.content: How can I create a custom event  in Service Cloud v2 for a custom button created and make a call to a custom BTP CPI iFlow from that event ?

entry.title: Unable to make a KUT field Mandatory in Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When working on Service Cloud Version 2, I have created a KUT field, however I am unable to make the field mandatory can you please advice what is not correct or if I am missing any configurations. Please find attached screen shot

Also can someone let me know what does the term Updatable mean, 

Kind Regards

Atul

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud v2 Employee Replication
entry.content:
I am trying to replicate employee from HANA to Service Cloud v2 . Currently using postman to trigger iFlow instead of HANA but getting the following error in v2 :                                                                                                    {
"code": "inbound-data-connector.132",
"message": "Failed to process the inbound message.",
"details": [
{
"code": "400",
"message": "{\"error\":{\"message\":\"Lifecycle status is initial. Please provide a value.\",\"code\":\"sap.crm.md.service.businessPartnerService.businessPartnerMessage.lifeCycleStatusInitial\",\"target\":\"{lifeCycleStatus}\"}}"
}
]
}

entry.title: Sales Cloud Version 2 - Lead Mashup inconsistent Parameters
entry.content:
I'm trying enhance the BO Lead with a custom development on the BTP. For that, I would need the stored email as parameter to the Mashup.

Currently, I'm not getting any parameters of the Lead passed to the Mashup, even if selected. Only if I change an arbitrary value (in the screenshots param8) and hit apply, I get at least something passed to the mashup. But in this case, in both params the accountID is selected, but the leadID is passed.

Is anyone experiencing similar issues, or knows how to fix that?

entry.title: How to integrate sap build work zone for knowledge base in agent desktop as a mashup?
entry.content:
I am using SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition and SAP Service Cloud Version 2. I want to integrate SAP Build Work Zone as a mashup in Agent Desktop.
Please guide me step-by-step how to achieve this.

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Service Cloud @Trinidad

entry.title: Integration SAP Service Cloud <-> SAP CDP / Fetching data error - rest service
entry.content:
Hello together,

we have followed this video in excatly the same way. But when trying to ingest the data from the sap service cloud we get the error: Fetching data error - rest service

and the job fails:

Where we could start looking for the error?

Where we can get the hostname of the SAP CDP from? Is this just the URL?

entry.title: Workflow e-mails are not displayed in the timeline tab in ticket
entry.content:
Hi all, 

is it possible to make workflow emails visible in the timeline tab in the ticket?
So we currently sending out workflow emails to the contact person for status "created", "in process" and "completed". But only the manually written e-mails and the replies from customer are visible in the timeline. No automatic workflow emails are there displayed. These I only see in the tab "workflow changes" as a user. 

For me as administrator I can check with "Administrator - Service & Social Media - Outbound E-Mail Monitoring". But this option is not possible for the end user. 

Thanks for help. 
Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: Service Cloud V2 last agent interaction
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

on Service Cloud V1 I had the Last Agent Interaction and Last Customer Interaction values available to use them on WFR.

Now on the Service Cloud V2 I can't find those fields to be used under Determinations.

Does anyone know if they have a different name now or if they actually don't exit more in V2?

My use case is to set the Status to Waiting for Reply when the agent creates an interaction, and then set it to In Process when the customer replies back.

Best regards,

Eduardo

entry.title: Automatic internal note/memo for "copy to existing ticket"
entry.content:
Hi all, 

in the ticket timeline there are options to move or copy emails to other tickets. If you use the "move to existing ticket" an automatic internal memo/note is created, that states to which ticket the email was moved. See screenshot. 

 


Is this possible to configure as well for the option "copy to existing ticket"? Currently for copy I dont get the note.
I checked the scoping questions and workflows, but didnt find a way to do so. 

 

It would help the processors to identify the correct ticket, where the email conversion should be maintained. We have the issue, that sometimes customer contacts dont reply with the ticket number in the email header. Then new tickets are created automatically. These are set to irrelevant and the mail is moved to the already existing ticket. Assume that the customer still replies with a wrong ticket no, the processors again need to shift the mails. That is the business use case. 

Thanks.
Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: Sales cloud version 2 - App - Offline Functionality
entry.content:
In Sales Cloud Version 1, there was an Offline Mode within the App.

Now in the New App for Sales Cloud Version 2, there seems to be no 'Offline' functionality.

Is the same offline functionality planned as part of the feature parity?

Up until now we only got the information that it is not clear if this will come or maybe be just sold for an extra Retail/App license.  So does that mean, the standard App for Version 2 is not having an offline mode anymore?

A lot of customers are still requesting this.

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud V2 - Case creation in Full screen mode
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

Is it possible to create the Case in the full screen mode? I couldn't find any setting related to it. Do we have similar behaviour as V1?

 

 #ServicecloudV2 SAP Service Cloud

entry.title: Auto Flow - scheduled feature
entry.content:
In the Version 1 there was an option to set the workflows as 'scheduled' in order to implement something like:

"Send an email to the quote owner 5 days before the Valid To date is reached"

In the Verison 2 currently within the Auto Flow there is no option for scheduled flows. When is this planned?

entry.title: Placeholders - unable to see the data related to placeholders using templates in Case
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We had a problem using Placeholders in templates in SAP Service Cloud version 2.

We want to display the name of our contact in a response template. But, when insert the template, contact's name is not display. 

Image 1. HTML code

Image 2. Template configuration in SSCV2

Image 3. Email received by account contact

Thanks! 🙂

#SAPSalesCloudVersion2 #SAPServiceCloudVersion2 #Version2

entry.title: Can we connect Service Cloud V1 and V2 to the same S4 HANA tenant. ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts. 

We want to explore Service Cloud V2 and the user story appears that it is possible to connect V1 and V2 running on the same S4 HANA tenant?

entry.title: Sales Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

does anybody know any documentation or training materials regarding the following topics? 
1. Sales Cloud: Creation of interested parties, up to promotion as a customer.

2. Sales Cloud: Lead from a marketing campaign, create activities, and convert them into opportunities.

3. Sales Cloud: Tracking the opportunity, creating offers, winning the opportunity, and creating the sales order.

4. Service Cloud: Receiving a request, processing the ticket, search a knowledge base, and solving the problem.

Many thanks in advance !
